requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — Portuguese / IEC Legacy Island Projects
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——葡语 / IEC传统岛屿项目
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——葡語 / IEC傳統島嶼項目

summary.en: No confirmed standalone Sao Tome and Principe mandatory product certification route for PV inverter safety has been identified. In practice, grid-connected and donor-backed PV projects should expect IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 safety type-test evidence for solar PV inverters, because the market follows Portuguese/IEC legacy technical practice and project specifications are commonly written around IEC evidence. The safety file should cover electric shock protection, insulation coordination, thermal performance, enclosure protection, markings, residual-current behaviour, installation instructions, and any storage-hybrid inverter configuration. Coastal salt-mist exposure, high humidity, and sea-freight-only logistics mean the safety case should also include corrosion controls, IP rating, packaging, spare-parts, and storage-condition documentation.
summary.zh: 尚未识别出圣多美和普林西比针对光伏逆变器安全的独立强制性产品认证路径。实践中，并网和捐助方支持的光伏项目应预期需要太阳能光伏逆变器IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2安全型式试验证据，因为该市场沿用葡语/IEC技术传统，项目规格通常围绕IEC证据编写。安全文件应覆盖防触电、绝缘配合、热性能、外壳防护、标识、剩余电流行为、安装说明以及任何储能混合逆变器配置。沿海盐雾暴露、高湿度和只能依赖海运的物流意味着安全论证还应包括防腐控制、IP等级、包装、备件和储存条件文件。
summary.zht: 尚未識別出聖多美和普林西比針對光伏逆變器安全的獨立強制性產品認證路徑。實踐中，併網和捐助方支持的光伏項目應預期需要太陽能光伏逆變器IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2安全型式試驗證據，因為該市場沿用葡語/IEC技術傳統，項目規格通常圍繞IEC證據編寫。安全文件應覆蓋防觸電、絕緣配合、熱性能、外殼防護、標識、剩餘電流行為、安裝說明以及任何儲能混合逆變器配置。沿海鹽霧暴露、高濕度和只能依賴海運的物流意味著安全論證還應包括防腐控制、IP等級、包裝、備件和儲存條件文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Project-specific EMAE, donor, lender, EPC, or owner-engineer equipment safety requirements
Coastal island environmental documentation: IP rating, salt-mist corrosion controls, humidity derating, packaging, storage, and spare-parts plan

summary.en: China's common PV inverter safety baseline includes GB/T 37408-2021 and NB/T 32004, with testing and voluntary certification through Chinese domestic schemes. These records may help demonstrate manufacturing quality and model history, but they are not automatically accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for Sao Tome and Principe projects. China-side certificates also do not by themselves address Portuguese-language documentation, coastal salt-mist exposure, high humidity, packaging for sea freight, or hybrid solar-plus-storage configuration review.
summary.zh: 中国常见光伏逆变器安全基准包括GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004，并通过中国国内体系进行测试和自愿认证。这些记录可帮助证明制造质量和型号历史，但不会自动被接受为圣多美和普林西比项目的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据。中国侧证书本身也不能覆盖葡语文件、沿海盐雾暴露、高湿度、海运包装或太阳能加储能混合配置审查。
summary.zht: 中國常見光伏逆變器安全基準包括GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004，並通過中國國內體系進行測試和自願認證。這些記錄可幫助證明製造品質和型號歷史，但不會自動被接受為聖多美和普林西比項目的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據。中國側證書本身也不能覆蓋葡語文件、沿海鹽霧暴露、高濕度、海運包裝或太陽能加儲能混合配置審查。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
China voluntary CQC/CGC PV inverter certification evidence where available

gap.en: Gap: GB/T 37408-2021 and NB/T 32004 evidence does not automatically satisfy IEC 62109 safety expectations for Sao Tome and Principe projects. Exporters should prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates and reports from an accredited laboratory for the exact inverter model or family, plus Portuguese manuals, nameplate/marking review, IP rating evidence, salt-mist or corrosion-control data, humidity and temperature derating curves, and packaging controls for ocean freight. For hybrid inverters connected to batteries or donor-backed solar-plus-storage systems, confirm whether additional storage-system safety evidence is required by the project owner or lender.
gap.zh: 差距：GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004证据不会自动满足圣多美和普林西比项目对IEC 62109安全的预期。出口商应为具体逆变器型号或系列准备来自认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书和报告，并补充葡语手册、铭牌/标识审查、IP等级证据、盐雾或防腐数据、湿度和温度降额曲线以及海运包装控制。对于接入电池的混合逆变器或捐助方支持的太阳能加储能系统，应确认项目业主或贷款方是否要求额外储能系统安全证据。
gap.zht: 差距：GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004證據不會自動滿足聖多美和普林西比項目對IEC 62109安全的預期。出口商應為具體逆變器型號或系列準備來自認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書和報告，並補充葡語手冊、銘牌/標識審查、IP等級證據、鹽霧或防腐數據、濕度和溫度降額曲線以及海運包裝控制。對於接入電池的混合逆變器或捐助方支持的太陽能加儲能系統，應確認項目業主或貸款方是否要求額外儲能系統安全證據。

mandatory_status.target: No confirmed standalone national PV inverter safety certification route; mandatory in practice where EMAE, a donor, lender, EPC, or owner engineer requires IEC 62109 evidence before equipment acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or programme-specific under China domestic PV inverter schemes; not transferable as Sao Tome and Principe IEC 62109 acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A China GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 file should not be presented as equivalent to IEC 62109-1/-2 for Sao Tome and Principe. Prepare accredited IEC 62109 safety evidence, Portuguese-language installation documentation, and coastal-environment derating records before committing shipment. Verify final model-family coverage, hybrid storage requirements, and project acceptance criteria directly with EMAE, the donor/lender, and the appointed owner engineer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将中国GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004文件作为等同于圣多美和普林西比项目IEC 62109-1/-2的证据。应在承诺出货前准备认可的IEC 62109安全证据、葡语安装文件和沿海环境降额记录。请直接与EMAE、捐助方/贷款方及指定业主工程师核实最终型号系列覆盖、混合储能要求和项目接受标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將中國GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004文件作為等同於聖多美和普林西比項目IEC 62109-1/-2的證據。應在承諾出貨前準備認可的IEC 62109安全證據、葡語安裝文件和沿海環境降額記錄。請直接與EMAE、捐助方/貸款方及指定業主工程師核實最終型號系列覆蓋、混合儲能要求和項目接受標準。
